prospects.method: Submit or reference an MCP resource repo that points to the directory.
prospects.approvalTip: Include open-source MCP listings and avoid promotional language.

prospects.method: Open a maintainer-friendly PR under resources, directories, or discovery tools.
prospects.approvalTip: Focus on completeness, verification fields, and deployment/security notes.

prospects.method: Launch as the MCP server discovery layer.
prospects.approvalTip: Position as practical discovery for developers, not as a vague AI tools list.

prospects.method: Open PR under Resources or Directories.
prospects.approvalTip: Position as a visual ecosystem map and taxonomy.
Emphasize categorized agents, filters, verification, and update cadence.

prospects.source: Wikipedia AI agent article talk page
prospects.method: Only discuss as a possible citation for neutral categorization after methodology matures.
prospects.approvalTip: Do not add promotional links; become citation-worthy first.

prospects.method: Publish benchmark methodology article with canonical link.
prospects.approvalTip: Include reproducible criteria and clarify Q3 results are pending until the test window closes.

prospects.method: Submit the benchmark release only after data exists.
prospects.approvalTip: Lead with findings and methodology, never marketing.

prospects.method: Submit BestAIAgent.in as a comparison/database resource.
prospects.approvalTip: Showcase comparison and entity graph capabilities.

prospects.method: Publish award methodology and build-in-public update.
prospects.approvalTip: Explain judging criteria and sponsor separation.

prospects.method: Publish industry-specific workflow guide with canonical link.
prospects.approvalTip: Add unique workflows and avoid duplicated template prose.
